payload.answer: Unable to inspect memory mem_123 because no memory record or inspection data was provided in the input.

entity_resolution.reason: The request is to inspect an existing memory by ID, not to create or update durable memory. No memory contents for mem_123 were provided in the input.

details: No durable memory was created, updated, or deleted.
Inspection could not be completed because the referenced memory record was not available.

repair_options: Provide the stored contents or metadata for memory ID mem_123.
Retry the inspect command in an environment with access to Brain memory storage.
